titleStmt.title: SII 31.147: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 147. (A.R. No. B 1 of 1937.) ŚRĪRANGAM, TRICHINOPOLY TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the slab built into the pavement on the east side of the first prākāra in the Ranganāthasvāmi temple.

This is dated in the cyclic year Vishnu (vṛishu ?), śrāvana, śu. (10), Sunday, palaeographically this record can be assigned to 18th century A.D. The date of the record, probably is corresponding to August 3, Sunday 1701 A.D. f.d.t. 35.

States that the inscription is destroyed and got re-engraved, originaly donated by the king Chokkanātha-Nāyaka and his Queen Maṅgammavāru and kept on the east side of the tiru-vaṇṇāḻigai at the instance of the servants of the temple.
(Published in South Indaia Inscription Volume XXIV. Ins. No. 569, pp. 549.)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . vighanāma
saṁvatsaraṁ śrāvaṇa śu
daśami Ā lu yi śubhadi
namaṁdugataṁ cokkanādha
nāyanivāri pēriṭanuṁnnu
maṁggammagāri pēriṭanuṁnnu
śilāśāsanamuṁnnuvrāyiṁ
ci śrīraṁgganāyakuladivya ca
raṇakaṁjamula chāyanu
Ama¨rcivuṁḍḍagavāru Ā śi
lā śāsanamunu A¨rkkavu
ṁḍakuṁgā yevarōnu¨rmāgā
niki parihariṁccināru ganu
ka Aṁduku Ācāryuṁ
vāruṁnnu śrīraṁgganārā
yaṇajīyyaṁgāru mo
dalaina Anaṁttukottupari
karamunnu

Ā śilāśāsanaṁ Ava
tala parihariṁccina
vārki śrīraṁgganāyaku
la sannidhiniyaṁddu tiru
gapravēśaṁ lēkuṁḍḍā śē
Iṁcci Āśilāśāsana
muna tirugāyappaṭaṭṭēja
ya vijayula sannidhivāri
lōgā tiruvuṁṇāśi pradakṣi
ṇamu lōnu tū¨rppuchāya
nuraṁgganāyakula divyaca
raṇa kaṁjamulaku kiṁddanu Ā
macci yā śilāśāsanaṁ Āca
ścadra¨rkkasdhāyigānu yādaśca
ṁścadra sūryaśca yāvattiṣṭha ti
mēdini . Annaṭṭugānu yī śi
lā śāsanaṁ raṁgganāyakula
divyacaraṇa kiṁjamulaku
kiṁddanē vuṁḍḍataggadi Anisdhaḷaṁ
Anaṁttukottu parikaramunnū
śēIṁccinadi . Ī dharmanki yevaru
drōhaṁ talaṁstuvāḍu ga
ṁggā tīramaṁdu kavilāvunu caṁ
ppina pāpamuṁnnu bhraṁhmatyā
di pātakamu luṁnnū Anubha
viṁccunu Iṭani sammatiṁcci sdhaḷa
ṁ Anaṁttukottu parikaraṁmunnu vrā
Iṁccina śilāśāsanalu .
Digital edition of SII 31.147 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
